title: Sales & Marketing Attachment Trainee
description: Help identify grants, sponsors, pitch competitions, accelerator programmes, startup events, healthcare partners, innovation hubs, NGOs, and other organizations that can support the growth of the platform.
responsibilities: Researching grants, sponsors, pitch events, startup competitions, and accelerator programmes
Identifying potential partners in healthcare, technology, NGOs, universities, and innovation hubs
Creating and updating opportunity trackers
Drafting outreach emails and LinkedIn messages
Supporting applications for grants, events, and startup programmes
Preparing weekly progress reports
Supporting the founder in building visibility, credibility, and growth opportunities for the platform
requirements: Third-year or final-year student seeking attachment
Good communication skills
Good research skills
Organized and able to meet weekly targets
Basic computer skills
Willing to learn and work in a startup environment
Interested in healthcare, technology, AI, entrepreneurship, or social impact
Able to work with minimum supervision
preferredQualifications: Interest in startups, healthcare, AI, or digital health
Ability to use Google Docs, Google Sheets, Trello, Notion, or similar tools
benefits: Real startup experience
Exposure to AI, healthcare, digital health, and entrepreneurship
Experience in sales, marketing, research, and partnership outreach
Portfolio-ready work such as proposals, trackers, and campaign materials
Mentorship from a technical founder
Certificate of completion after successful attachment
Recommendation letter based on performance
Possibility of future paid roles depending on performance and availability of funding

title: Software Engineering Attachee
description: Support development of the platform by contributing to frontend and backend features, fixing bugs, and improving performance under guidance from the engineering team.
responsibilities: Building and maintaining mobile app features using Flutter and Dart
Supporting backend API development with Node.js, Express, and TypeScript
Integrating mobile screens with backend endpoints using Dio
Fixing bugs and improving application performance
Writing clean, readable, and reusable code
Participating in code reviews and technical discussions
Documenting technical work and preparing weekly progress reports
requirements: Third-year or final-year student seeking attachment
Basic understanding of Flutter and Dart
Basic understanding of state management with Riverpod
Basic understanding of API integration with Dio
Basic understanding of navigation with GoRouter
Basic understanding of backend development using Node.js, Express, and TypeScript
Basic understanding of PostgreSQL databases
Familiarity with Git and GitHub
Willing to learn and work in a startup environment
Organized and able to meet weekly targets
Able to work with minimum supervision
preferredQualifications: Experience with Riverpod, Dio, and GoRouter in a real project
Familiarity with TypeScript backend APIs using Express
Familiarity with Prisma ORM and PostgreSQL
Basic knowledge of testing and debugging workflows in Flutter or Node.js
Interest in healthcare, AI, startups, and social impact
benefits: Real startup engineering experience
Hands-on exposure to modern web development workflows
Mentorship from industry professionals
Portfolio-ready production work
Recommendation letter based on performance
